content.title: Support Kahf for Global Sadaqah Award
content.subtitle: Elevate Kahf Globally in Just 30 Seconds!
content.body:
Alhamdulillah, Kahf—the parent organization behind Muslims Day—has been nominated for the Global Sadaqah - Ma'a Impact Prize. We now need your and your family’s support to secure this win through your votes.

Steps to Cast Your Vote

  1. Visit the Link: Go to https://award.globalsadaqah.com/profiles/252

  2. Click "Vote Now": Look for the voting button on the profile page.

  3. Register/Sign Up: If you aren't registered yet, you will be prompted to do so.

  4. Verify via Email: Complete your registration using your email address.

  5. Finalize Vote: Once logged in, click "Vote Now" again to confirm.

Why Your Vote Matters

As you may know, the Muslims Day app is currently operated under the Kahf ecosystem. Kahf is working tirelessly to build a Halal and secure internet ecosystem, protecting you and future generations from the obscenity and harms of the digital world.

May Allah accept your time and effort in supporting this mission. Jazakallahu Khair.

footer_button.hint: Your Support is Needed for Kahf to Win!
